name: Quarta-Rad, Inc.
business: Quarta-Rad, Inc., through its wholly-owned subsidiary Sellavir, develops and markets AI-driven software solutions, including the CenterEye platform for call center analytics. The company has substantially reduced its legacy radiation detection equipment business. Substantially all of the company's revenue is derived from services provided through Sellavir to Star Systems Corporation, a related party.

exposures.sentence: Sellavir is now focused on developing and selling the CenterEye software product and other related tools for the call center market, leveraging AI and advanced analytics to improve call center operations and targeting integration with major platforms including Genesys Cloud, NICE CXone, and Avaya.

catalysts.event: Entered into Independent Software Vendor Partner Agreement with Genesys Cloud Services, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we entered into an Independent Software Vendor Partner Agreement with Genesys Cloud Services, Inc., pursuant to which the Company will integrate its proprietary contact center technologies into the Genesys Cloud platform, one of the world's leading AI-powered experience orchestration engines.
